name: Patient 11
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since adolescence. Past friendship difficulties. Recent breakup preceded depressive relapse. On SSRIs with recent adjustments.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: My depression makes me too damaged for relationships.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will always be depressed and alone.
situation: Engaged in a conversation with a friend about mental health struggles.
auto_thought: They can't possibly understand how dark it really gets for me.
behavior: Discuss mental health with friend while feeling disconnected.
